name: ai-vector-search
title: Vector Search
description: pgvector extension with documents table and HNSW index for semantic search
docs:
# Vector search template

Adds pgvector-backed storage and SQL helpers for similarity search over embeddings.

## Includes

- Vector extension setup and document embedding tables
- Search functions for nearest-neighbor queries

## Dependencies

Requires **database**. Often combined with **ai-automatic-embeddings** for kept-in-sync vectors.
